EVE Online — overview window, dense tabular MMO UI

Clawmachine-fit: A. The permission to have a window with 200 rows + 20 columns. Column header vocabulary (range/angular/type/transversal) is pure operator bait.

Credits: CCP Games, support.eveonline.com, forums.eveonline.com, r/Eve community.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
